rules: A feature flips to done:true ONLY when its gate passes under report().
Never delete or weaken a feature's gate or verify step.
Work one feature per session; leave the repo merge-ready.
Every geometry mutation is followed by snapshot() + report() before evaluating.

features.desc: Public GitHub repo with baseline commit, inspirations/ committed as-is.
features.gate: git remote reachable AND baseline commit pushed

features.desc: Blender + Inkscape installed; init.sh launches Blender and prints scene state.
Official Blender MCP extension (lab_blender_org/mcp) running; harness drives it via scripts/mcp_client.py over the live TCP socket (localhost:9876, null-byte JSON {type:execute,code,strict_json}).
features.gate: mcp_client can run bpy that creates+exports a cube AND headless report/snapshot confirm it
features.verify: python3 scripts/mcp_client.py ping; smoke: create cube, export glb, save master.blend, report+snapshot

features.desc: snapshot() renders canonical cameras; report() writes telemetry JSON.
features.gate: snapshot produces N images AND report writes telemetry/*.json with dims+watertight
features.verify: run both scripts on a primitive, agent views render + reads json

features.desc: Reverse-engineer the last from real Oxford/Derby photos. trace_side.py + trace_top.py (OpenCV via uv) extract the top/instep silhouette and width from orthographic H&M Derby photos; reconstruct_last.py lofts cross-sections (traced top + traced width + modelled featherline/heel-seat/toe-spring bottom) into a watertight LAST.
features.gate: LAST mesh exists, watertight, length within a few mm of target, heel at origin / toe +Y / up +Z
features.verify: report() dims+watertight; snapshot() lateral+3/4; visual: recognizable last (instep hump, toe taper, heel seat)
features.note: v4 (scripts/reconstruct_last.py): image-derived + lofted LAST-SHAPED cross-sections (flat featherline bottom + domed asymmetric top), n-gon end caps (no pinching poles), Catmull-Clark subsurf. Smooth organic last: rounded heel, rounded toe box, convex instep, asymmetric plan, watertight. Tried + rejected: v1 ellipse loft (pointed toe), v2, v3 boolean plan/profile intersection (accurate silhouettes but slab-sided/blocky). Key fixes learned: prisms/from_pydata need recalc_face_normals BEFORE boolean (else voxel remesh makes a hollow shell); convex-smooth the traced top to remove the lace-throat dip; round heel/toe in the silhouette, not via mesh smoothing.

features.desc: Scale to mm, orient (heel origin/toe +Y/up +Z), fill holes, derive featherline.
features.gate: scale_error_mm within tolerance AND watertight AND orientation correct
features.verify: report() dims vs last spec; snapshot() all cameras

features.desc: Shrinkwrap a clean quad upper skin; define topline/throat/featherline.
features.gate: upper conforms to last (no gaps) AND topline curve defined

features.desc: Apply dress-shoe panels (toe cap, vamp, quarters, facing, heel counter, tongue) + Nishaan motif lines; separate each panel; add lasting allowance.
features.gate: expected panel objects exist AND each has lasting allowance margin
features.verify: report() panel inventory + areas; snapshot() top+3/4

features.desc: Flatten each panel (Paper Model + UV minimize-stretch); auto-insert seams and re-split until within tolerance.
features.verify: report() per-panel stretch; snapshot() distortion heatmap

features.desc: Inkscape CLI: seam allowances, notches, grain, labels, mirror L/R; export tiled PDF + DXF/SVG.
features.gate: DXF roundtrip dims within tolerance AND all panels labelled+mirrored
features.verify: re-import DXF, report() dims; visual check of tiled PDF

features.desc: Assemble render + panel/material list + last specs + allowances into a maker package.
features.gate: package contains DXF/SVG + tiled PDF + render + panel list
